title: Fabulously Modded
description: a modpack for family and friends. made public because why not?
body: A small (i think) (edit: not anymore lol) modpack that can actually run on lower end devices (edit: this part is still true). it's only meant for me and my family/friends and the only reason im putting it on modrinth is to make it easier to update and to make it easier for it to be downloaded on a server we're making, but i just thought why not make it public? this Modpack uses Fabulously Optimised as a framework (specifically so my brother's 5 year old potato laptop can run it), but adds some QoL changes (Like BetterF3 and Better Third Person), a bit of visual & auditory flair (like Bedrockify, 3D Skin Layers, and Sound Physics Remastered), a good amount of worldgen (Terralith and BetterNether/End), and basically everying YUNGNICKYOUNG has put out. the heavy hitters though are Medieval Origins Revival, LevelZ, and Better Combat. i tried to make something to refresh the honestly kinda boring parts of vanilla minecraft. i also wanted to make the Overworld feel fairly normal, while the Nether and End felt very different.
